name: Iso11783IL_OPChangeSoftKeyMask
title: Iso11783IL_OPChangeSoftKeyMask
syntax: long Iso11783IL_OPChangeSoftKeyMask( dword maskID, dword softKeyMaskID ); // form 1
description: The function changes the soft key mask of a data mask. A Change Soft Key Mask command is sent to the Virtual Terminal.
If parameter maskType is not used the mask type is determined by the mask object.

parameters.name: maskID
parameters.description: object ID of the data mask
